title: German-Flag-Hotbar
description: This resource pack turns your hotbar, your armor icons and your hearts into the German Flag
body:
🇩🇪 German Flag HUD – Resource Pack

German Flag HUD transforms your Minecraft interface with a bold German theme!
This resource pack replaces the default Hotbar, Health, Armor, and Hunger icons with custom designs inspired by the German flag (Black–Red–Gold).

✨ Features

✅ Hotbar selection outline in German flag colors
❤️ Health hearts redesigned with a black-red-gold theme
🛡️ Armor icons in German flag style
🍖 Hunger icons with a German flag look
🧩 Fully compatible with Vanilla, Fabric, Forge, and OptiFine
🎨 Clean, high-quality custom textures

📌 Compatibility

Minecraft 1.8 – 1.21+

Works with any shaders

No mods required

🔧 Installation

Download the resource pack

Move it into your resourcepacks folder

Enable it in the Minecraft menu

Enjoy your new German-styled HUD! 🇩🇪
